name: Scallops with Vermicelli
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Canned Italian tomatoes, undrained and cut up
12 ounces Uncooked vermicelli, hot-cooked and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the scallops.
2. Combine the scallops, lemon juice, and parsley in a glass dish. Cover and marinate in the refrigerator while preparing the sauce.
3. Cook and stir onion and garlic in oil and 1 tablespoon of butter in a large skillet over medium-high heat until the onion is tender.
4. Add the tomatoes with juice, basil, oregano, and thyme. Reduce the heat to low.
5. Cover and simmer for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
6. Drain the scallops.
7. Cook and stir the scallops in the remaining tablespoon of butter in another large skillet over medium heat until the scallops are opaque, about 2 minutes.
8. Add cream, nutmeg, and tomato sauce to the scallops.
9. Pour the sauce over vermicelli in a large bowl and toss gently to coat.
10. Garnish as desired.
